info.name: SaaS Project - Full API
info.description:
Full API: Auth, Tenants, Users, Appointments, Slots, Services, Customers, Store, Catalog, Reports, Promotions, Followups, Upload, Retention, Admin, Cron, Workflows, Staff, WhatsApp, AI, AI Assistant (Super Admin), Integrations.

Defaults align with `settings` mock seed (`tenant_demo`, `testtenant@example.com` / `123456`). Run `python scripts/super_admin/seed_mock_data.py` from project root. Auth → Login saves `access_token`.

body.raw:
{
  "business_name": "Demo Business",
  "plan": "pro",
  "currency": "INR",
  "tz": "Asia/Kolkata",
  "date_format": "DD-MM-YYYY",
  "modules": ["core", "store", "salon", "ai"],
  "capabilities": ["store.catalog", "salon.appointments", "ai.whatsapp_intents"],
  "whatsapp_config": { "enabled": true, "provider": "twilio" },
  "faq": { "refund": "Refunds within 7 days.", "delivery": "2-3 business days." }
}

{
  "sku": "{{sku}}",
  "name": "Facial Cream",
  "category": "Skincare",
  "price": 299,
  "mrp": 349,
  "unit": "pcs",
  "active": true,
  "description": "Deeply nourishing cream with SPF 30. Apply morning and night for best results.",
  "image_urls": [
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_main.jpg",
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_side.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: `image_urls` is an ordered list of image paths/URLs (gallery); `image_url` is auto-synced to `image_urls[0]` for backward compatibility. `description` is shown in the product detail modal on the public catalog.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "{{sku}}",
  "name": "Facial Cream Deluxe",
  "category": "Skincare",
  "price": 349,
  "active": true,
  "description": "Updated: premium formula with hyaluronic acid.",
  "image_urls": [
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_main.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: No auth. Returns `name`, `whatsapp_number`, and `currency` (ISO 4217 code, e.g. INR). Used by the public catalog page to render the correct currency symbol.
No auth. Active products only. Returns `image_urls` (gallery), `description`, `price`, `discount_type`, `discount_value` etc.
No auth. Top-selling products by order quantity in last N days. Used by catalog 'popular' tab.
No auth. Active category names for filter chips.
No auth. Returns currently valid offers with `discount_info` (type + value) and `product_skus`. Catalog page uses this to show offer badges and discounted prices.
No auth. Creates an order from catalog cart. Returns `order_id`.
Returns all offers. `active_only=true` limits to currently valid (valid_from <= now <= valid_until).
`discount_info.type`: `percent` or `amount`. `value` is the magnitude. Send `discount_info: {}` for a label-only offer with no price change. Response `id` saved to `offer_id` variable.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "New Arrival",
  "description": "Freshly added products — check them out!",
  "valid_from": "2026-04-01T00:00:00",
  "valid_until": "2026-12-31T23:59:59",
  "product_skus": ["SKU-DEMO-1"],
  "discount_info": {},
  "active": true
}

request.description: Empty `discount_info` creates a label-only offer — the offer badge shows on the catalog but no price reduction is applied.
Partial update. Send `discount_info: {}` to clear the discount while keeping the offer label.
Creates multiple offers in one request. Returns `{ created, items, errors }`.
Returns all supported countries with ISO2 code, name, and dial code. Used for the phone number input country picker in the admin UI.

item.name: Bot Next Step (Super Admin or Tenant Admin)

request.description: Simulates a single WhatsApp bot conversation turn. Super Admin can test any tenant. Tenant Admin can only test their own tenant — X-Tenant header must match the tenant in their JWT. Returns 403 if tenant_admin tries to access another tenant's bot.
List intent keywords (global + tenant). Super Admin only.
Add or update intent keywords. scope=tenant requires tenant. Super Admin only.
Delete one intent. Super Admin only.
Seed ai_knowledge_base with global intent phrases from defaults. Idempotent. Super Admin only.
Get config for AI Assistant screen: fallback message, intent order, available intents. Super Admin only.
Update fallback message. Per-tenant via PUT /tenants/{tenant} ai_config.
List ai_training_data. Super Admin only.

body.raw:
{
  "scope": "tenant",
  "intent": "book_appointment",
  "text": "I want to book a slot tomorrow",
  "tenant": "{{tenant}}",
  "source": "manual"
}

request.description: Add labeled example. scope=tenant requires tenant. Super Admin only.
Menu entry for frontend; visible only for super_admin.
